rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "month" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists

description: Values in 'month' must be valid string
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT "month" IS NULL AND TRY_CAST("month" AS TEXT) IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "town" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "flat_type" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "block" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "street_name" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "storey_range" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "floor_area_sqm" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "flat_model" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "lease_commence_date" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "remaining_lease" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "resale_price" FROM "hdb_resale_prices" LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices"

description: Based on ISO 8601, assumed to be in UTC +8 | YYYY-MM
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(TRY_CAST(month AS TEXT), '^[0-9]{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$')

description: Count of NULL values in 'town' of 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE "town" IS NULL

description: Count of invalid values in 'flat_type' of 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT "flat_type" IS NULL AND NOT TRY_CAST("flat_type" AS TEXT) IN ('1 ROOM', '2 ROOM', '3 ROOM', '4 ROOM', '5 ROOM', 'EXECUTIVE', 'MULTI-GENERATION')

description: House number component of a street address | Alphanumeric up to 10 characters (e.g. 12, 535, 358C)
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(TRY_CAST(block AS TEXT), '^[A-Za-z0-9]{1,10}$')

description: Validates that floor area must be less than 200
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE TRY_CAST(floor_area_sqm AS BIGINT) >= 200

description: Based on ISO 8601, assumed to be in UTC +8 | YYYY
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(TRY_CAST(lease_commence_date AS TEXT), '^[0-9]{4}$')

description: Resale price must not be more than 2 million SGD
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "hdb_resale_prices" WHERE TRY_CAST(resale_price AS BIGINT) > 2000000
